Admin Settings

Audit Log
Timeline Change Reasons - shown when a schedule change requires justification
Defer Reasons - shown when deferring items in the Planning Board
Departments - pill color and the emails notified when a ticket is submitted for the department
Export Data
Full Backup is a complete server-side snapshot - every item plus comments, activity, audit log, watchers, planning data, and settings. Use it for backups. Quick Export is a lighter in-browser dump (items + core lists only).
Import Data
Load a previously exported JSON file. This will replace all current data.

Jira Connection
Checking connection…
Public Ticket Portal
Portal link (share this):
Projects offered in the portal (none checked = all; optional per-project email overrides the team address for that project's tickets)
Types offered in the portal (none checked = all)
Jira Project Mapping
Map each Flow project to a Jira project key.
Jira Status Mapping
Map Flow statuses to Jira statuses. Items only move forward automatically - Jira changes will not regress a Flow status.
Jira Issue Type Mapping
Map Flow item types to Jira issue types (e.g. Feature → Story).
Background Pull-Sync
Automatically refresh linked Jira issues on a schedule. Manual refresh is always available on the Item Page.

Admin Controls

Capacity Conflicts

Click Add Delay on any item to shift its schedule forward by the number of working days in the conflict span. Weekends are skipped. A change log entry is created with reason "Capacity Conflict".
